one_time_description: Forgiveness of Treaty negotiation loan by Governments of Canada and British Columbia
economic_notes: Band operates Alkali Resource Management Ltd. (wholly owned, revenue $14.1M), Ecolink Forest Services Ltd. (50% owned), Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. (wholly owned), and Alkali Enterprises store. COVID-19 pandemic declared in March 2020 with uncertain financial impact noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Major one-time item: $7,773,605 Treaty negotiation loan forgiven by Canada and BC, recorded in Statement of Changes in Net Financial Assets. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Ecolink Forest Services Ltd. (50% owned) and Alkali Resource Management Ltd. (100% owned). Two wholly owned subsidiaries consolidated: Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. and Alkali Enterprises store. Prior period adjustments restated opening accumulated surplus: $400,000 investment in Dog Creek Ranch previously expensed in 2005, and $25,232 CMHC replacement reserve adjustment. ISC funding calculated as ISC Operating $3,688,329 + ISC Capital $653,800 = $4,342,129. Total government transfers include ISC, FNHA, CMHC, CCATEC, Dept of Justice, DFO, Natural Resources, FNESC, Province of BC, BC Hydro, New Relationship Trust, and wage subsidy. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Net financial assets of $6,380,162 is positive due primarily to the treaty loan forgiveness.
